objective: Exact fixes for every vulnerability identified in Workflow 1
note: Due to size constraints, detailed fixes are documented in workflow_1_attack_analysis.json. Key hardening strategies:
key_strategies: Add None checks before all Bob output parsing
Validate dict structure before accessing keys
Add try-except around file I/O operations
Convert asyncio.gather exceptions to error dicts
Check external tool availability (Z3, Bob) before use
Add schema validation for parsed JSON
Implement timeout handling for Bob calls
Add type validation helpers in core/types.py
Return most complete match, not first match in parsers
Validate array dimensions before numpy operations
